description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display dominating the front surface, featuring a centered punch-hole camera at the top. The back is a matte blue finish with a triple camera array and a flash module arranged vertically in the upper left corner. The device has a slim profile with slightly rounded edges and a subtle camera bump on the rear. Physical buttons are visible along the right edge, likely for power and volume control. The branding is subtly embossed on the lower back panel. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, typical of contemporary high-end mobile phones.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, matte blue back, and triple rear cameras.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large, nearly bezel-less display with a centered punch-hole camera at the top.
description_view_1: Right side view reveals the slim profile and the presence of physical buttons along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displays a matte blue finish, triple camera array with flash in the top left, and subtle branding.
description_view_3: Left side view highlights the thinness of the device with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed 'SAMSUNG' text centered on the lower back panel in a subtle, slightly reflective finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple brushstroke patterns; no icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Triple camera array vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a single flash module to the right of the cameras.
attribute_button_layout: Two slim physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely serving as the power button and volume rocker.
